---
name: other-name
description: Summarizes the weekly on-call handoff. Use when rotating on-call ownership at the start of a week.
---

# On-call handoff summary

Summarize open incidents, silenced alerts, and in-flight mitigations for
the incoming on-call engineer.

1. Read the incident tracker for anything still open.
2. List alerts that were silenced and why.
3. Hand off with links to any runbooks that were used.
